goal: Visit this page, take a screenshot, rate the design /10 as a senior product designer. Note 2 concrete defects. This is cloud.tangle.tools — a dark-themed blockchain services dashboard. One-line verdict per page.

action.criteria: As a senior product designer, rate this Earnings page of the dark-themed blockchain services dashboard out of 10. Assess: visual hierarchy, consistency with other pages, typography/readability, spacing, color contrast, empty state quality (if present), navigation active state indicators, overall polish. Identify 2 specific design defects that impact usability or visual quality.

steps.expectedEffect: Will receive a design evaluation with rating, defects identified, and visual assessment of the Earnings page
